name: Graig Goch Garage
title: Graig Goch Garage
location: Graig Goch Garage, Cwmbach, Builth Wells, Powys, LD2 3RU
services: MOT Testing Station - Classes 4 and 7 (cars, vans and goods vehicles up to 3,500kg)
about: Graig Goch Garage is an independent MOT test centre and automotive workshop near Newbridge on Wye in Powys, Wales. Everyone who uses a vehicle on the road must keep it in a roadworthy condition. The MOT test checks that vehicles meet road safety and environmental standards.
mot_info: Authorised MOT test station displaying blue three triangles logo. Classes 4 and 7 tested.
